span.p:
M.1 Architecture-Reuse Duality
复用即约束传递

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
M.3 Hierarchy Non-Reduction
层次不可约

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
E.1 Reuse Asset Existence
可复用资产须稳定/通用/封装

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
S.1 Interface Substitution
外部可观察行为等价则可替换

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
S.4 Abstraction Layering
抽象分层约束

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
命题 P1
标准对齐是复用的前提

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 理由：不同上下文复用需要共同语义基线

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
命题 P2
ISO 42010 视点是可复用描述单元

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 理由：视点封装关注点+模型约定，跨项目稳定

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
命题 P3
TOGAF/ArchiMate 互补而非互斥

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 理由：ADM 回答过程，ArchiMate 回答语言，42010 回答元模型

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
命题 P4
产品线工程需要显式变性管理

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 理由：M.2 可变性公理要求 B≠∅ 且 V≠∅

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
命题 P5
接口契约必须优先于实现复用

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 理由：S.1 可替换性仅依赖外部行为

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
命题 P6
跨层映射需要对应规则保证一致性

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 理由：S.4 禁止跨层直接依赖，对应规则是显式桥接
